query:
-- Cajas físicas
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cash_registers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  location VARCHAR(200),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000)
);

-- Turnos de caja (sesiones)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cash_sessions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  register_id INT NOT NULL,
  cashier_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  cashier_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  opening_amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  closing_amount DECIMAL(10,2),
  counted_cash DECIMAL(10,2),
  cash_difference DECIMAL(10,2),
  total_cash DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_card DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_bizum DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_mixed DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_manual_out DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  total_manual_in DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('open','closed') DEFAULT 'open',
  notes TEXT,
  opened_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  closed_at BIGINT,
  FOREIGN KEY (register_id) REFERENCES cash_registers(id)
);

-- Movimientos manuales de caja (salidas/entradas)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS cash_movements (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  session_id INT NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('out','in') NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  cashier_name VARCHAR(200),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES cash_sessions(id)
);

-- Ventas TPV
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tpv_sales (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ticket_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  session_id INT NOT NULL,
  reservation_id INT,
  invoice_id INT,
  customer_name VARCHAR(200),
  customer_email VARCHAR(200),
  customer_phone VARCHAR(50),
  subtotal DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  discount_amount DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  discount_reason VARCHAR(200),
  total DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('pending','paid','cancelled','refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  paid_at BIGINT,
  FOREIGN KEY (session_id) REFERENCES cash_sessions(id)
);

-- Líneas de venta TPV
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tpv_sale_items (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sale_id INT NOT NULL,
  product_type ENUM('experience','pack','spa','hotel','restaurant','extra') NOT NULL,
  product_id INT NOT NULL,
  product_name VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  unit_price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  discount_percent DECIMAL(5,2) DEFAULT 0,
  subtotal DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  event_date DATE,
  event_time VARCHAR(10),
  participants INT DEFAULT 1,
  notes VARCHAR(500),
  FOREIGN KEY (sale_id) REFERENCES tpv_sales(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Subpagos de venta TPV (para pago mixto y división de cuenta)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tpv_sale_payments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sale_id INT NOT NULL,
  payer_name VARCHAR(200),
  method ENUM('cash','card','bizum','other') NOT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  amount_tendered DECIMAL(10,2),
  change_given DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0,
  status ENUM('pending','completed','failed','refunded') DEFAULT 'pending',
  reference VARCHAR(200),
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL DEFAULT (UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW(3)) * 1000),
  FOREIGN KEY (sale_id) REFERENCES tpv_sales(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Insertar caja por defecto
INSERT IGNORE INTO cash_registers (id, name, location, is_active) VALUES (1, 'Caja Principal', 'Recepción Náyade', TRUE);
